title: My Job to Care
lesson: Looking after a pet every day teaches you to be responsible and caring.
prompts: In a cozy living room, warm light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits gently holding a small fluffy brown puppy, with a delighted smile. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels nearby smiling warmly. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy home kitchen — a pet food bowl and a water bowl, warm light — the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image stands in the mid-ground, nodding attentively with one hand resting on their chin, listening as a small fluffy brown puppy sits at their feet. In the foreground, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} points to the pet food bowl and the water bowl, explaining. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

The puppy waits happily beside the bowl. Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

Eye-level medium shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.

In a cozy living room, golden afternoon light, the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits with the healthy, happy small fluffy brown puppy in their lap, with a proud, joyful smile. Nearby, {GENDER_F_AGE_35_RACE_ASIAN_PARENT} kneels beside them, resting a gentle hand on their shoulder with a warm, approving smile. Eye-level medium-wide shot, photorealistic, cinematic photography style. Preserve the facial features, skin tone and hairstyle of the person from the input image.
gists: In a cozy living room, the child gently holds a small brown puppy, delighted, while the mother kneels nearby smiling.

In a cozy home kitchen with a food bowl and a water bowl, the child nods attentively with a hand on their chin as the puppy sits at their feet, while the mother points to the bowls, explaining a puppy needs daily care.
In the kitchen, the child kneels alone pouring kibble into the pet food bowl while the small brown puppy waits happily beside the bowl, caring and focused.
In a sunny garden, the child walks holding a leash, cheerful, as the small brown puppy trots along on the leash — walking the puppy.
Back in the cozy living room, the child sits alone gently brushing and cuddling the small brown puppy, tender and happy.

In the living room in golden afternoon light, the child sits with the healthy happy puppy in their lap, proud and joyful, while the mother kneels with a hand on their shoulder, approving — caring is the child's job.
texts: One morning, {NAME} cuddled a little brown puppy. "He's so soft!" said {NAME}. "He likes you," said Mum, smiling nearby.
"A puppy needs care every single day," said Mum, pointing to the food and water bowls. "Can I help?" asked {NAME}. "Of course," said Mum.
{NAME} knelt down and poured the puppy's food into the bowl. "Here you go, puppy," said {NAME}. The puppy waited happily, tail wagging.
Out in the garden, {NAME} took the puppy for a walk on the leash. Trot, trot, trot! "Good boy!" said {NAME}.
Back inside, {NAME} gently brushed and cuddled the puppy. "All clean and cosy," said {NAME}. The puppy felt happy and loved.
The healthy, happy puppy snuggled in {NAME}'s lap. "You take such good care of him," said Mum. "Caring for him is my job!" said {NAME} proudly.
